steps.title: Complete the square for x and y
Identify the center and radius
steps.content: The circle has center $(2, 4)$ and radius $r = \sqrt{100} = 10$.

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content: An inscribed circle has the same diameter as the square's side, so side $= 2r = 20$ and perimeter $= 4 \times 20 = 80$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
